meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Master AI Project Management & Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Learn a professional project management workflow for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Overwhelmed by AI tools? You need a unified project management stack. By integrating Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for rapid execution, you transform scattered prompts into a streamlined, repeatable development pipeline. This approach reduces cognitive load, keeps your code modular, and allows you to deliver high-quality client projects significantly faster.
content.intro:
The modern freelancer’s dashboard is a chaotic graveyard of disconnected AI windows, half-baked snippets, and lost context. You started using AI to save time, yet you find yourself spending more time managing prompts and copy-pasting code than actually building. The friction is killing your velocity and eroding your margins.

It’s time to move from 'prompt engineer' to 'AI Architect.' By treating your development process as a project management challenge rather than a series of one-off chats, you can reclaim your workflow. This tutorial will show you how to synthesize Antigravity’s structural oversight with the raw, terminal-based power of Claude Code to create a professional-grade shipping machine.

steps.title: Architect the Project Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, define your project structure and dependencies to ensure the AI understands the system architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a project manifest for a SaaS MVP. Define directory structure, core dependencies, and technical constraints. Output a schema that minimizes technical debt.

steps.title: Establish Contextual Guardrails
steps.description: Lock in your coding standards and style guide so that Claude Code maintains consistency across your entire repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a .clauderules file. Include rules for modular component design, strict TypeScript types, and professional error handling patterns.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use your architectural plan to generate boilerplate code, ensuring you aren't writing repetitive infrastructure code manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the schema, generate the boilerplate for the authentication and database service modules using the established standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate auth and db boilerplate based on manifest'

steps.title: Iterative Implementation Cycles
steps.description: Break features into small, testable chunks. Claude Code handles the implementation while you review the output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Decompose the user dashboard feature into three distinct tickets with specific acceptance criteria and implementation steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement dashboard ticket 1: user profile display'

steps.title: Systematic Quality Assurance
steps.description: Automate the testing phase by feeding your requirements back into the agent to verify functionality against the initial schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase against the original project schema. Identify any deviations or missing error states.

pro_tips: Always maintain a .clauderules file in your root; it acts as the 'source of truth' that prevents AI drift during long-term projects.
Use Antigravity to generate pseudo-code diagrams before triggering Claude Code; this forces the AI to plan logic before executing syntax.
Treat your CLI history as your project log; Claude Code's session logs are excellent for reconstructing client progress reports.
Force modularity by prompting for 'single-responsibility functions'—it makes future debugging exponentially easier when the client asks for changes.
When a feature gets complex, use Antigravity to perform a 'recursive critique' of the code before committing it to the main branch.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://www.anthropic.com/news
content.next_steps: Now that your workflow is automated, focus on building a library of reusable 'Project Templates' in Antigravity to reduce your setup time for future clients to zero.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting AI tools manage you and start managing them to build better, faster products. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
